resources.string: The emerald ray calls forth each molecular bond, excising them from the flesh
EMERALD RAY NAMES EACH MOLECULAR BOND AND REMOVES IT.

Do not speak to us of miracles. Space folds because its seams have been measured. Time is severed because its grain has been mapped. A fragment of the treacherous idol screams inside a labyrinth of folded dimensions, powering the engine that disproves its divinity. Your mystics call the unknown sacred; our savants call it unfinished physics. At the end of science stands not wonder, but command.
DO NOT SPEAK OF MIRACLES. SPACE FOLDS BECAUSE ITS SEAMS ARE MEASURED. FALSE GODS SCREAM IN CAGES AND POWER OUR ENGINES. SCIENCE ENDS IN COMMAND.
